import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core'; @Component({ selector: 'app-cover', templateUrl: './cover.component.html', styleUrls: ['./cover.component.scss'] }) /** * 404 Cover Component */ export class CoverComponent implements OnInit { constructor() { } ngOnInit(): void { document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-sidebar-size', 'lg'); } }
